plugins.name: fetch
plugins.readme_excerpt: A Model Context Protocol server that provides web content fetching capabilities. This server enables LLMs to retrieve and process content from web pages, converting HTML to markdown for easier consump

plugins.name: filesystem
plugins.readme_excerpt: Node.js server implementing Model Context Protocol (MCP) for filesystem operations.

plugins.name: git
plugins.readme_excerpt: A Model Context Protocol server for Git repository interaction and automation. This server provides tools to read, search, and manipulate Git repositories via Large Language Models.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.readme_excerpt: A basic implementation of persistent memory using a local knowledge graph. This lets Claude remember information about the user across chats.

plugins.name: sequentialthinking
plugins.readme_excerpt: An MCP server implementation that provides a tool for dynamic and reflective problem-solving through a structured thinking process.

plugins.name: time
plugins.readme_excerpt: A Model Context Protocol server that provides time and timezone conversion capabilities. This server enables LLMs to get current time information and perform timezone conversions using IANA timezone n
